name: property managers processing 10–20 compliance reports/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10–20 compliance reports/month, manual preparation causes late submissions and potential fines. We automate report generation instead of manual report preparation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Manual preparation of compliance reports is time-consuming and prone to errors.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual preparation of compliance reports is time-consuming and prone to errors.
